prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the character base, transform the angel character sheet into a cute chibi three-view turnaround. Keep the original angel design, white feather wings, long pale hair, flower hair accessory, white dress, blue ribbons, barefoot look, soft pastel anime rendering, and plain white background. Change the body proportions to super-deformed chibi style with a large head, small childlike body, simplified hands and feet, and rounder silhouette while preserving the same delicate details. Arrange exactly 3 full-body views horizontally: front view on the left, side profile in the center, and back view on the right. Maintain clean character-reference-sheet spacing, high detail, soft lighting, and 4K-quality finish.
